'''Silika''' were sapients indigenous to [[Dohu VII]]<ref name="CSWE" />. They had a very rigid code of honor. Despite having three arms, they were not more dexterous due to their short, stubby fingers, additionally they had stumpy legs. As they consisted mainly of [[Silicon/Legends|silicon]], [[mineral water]]—or [[Silika water]] as they called it—had an intoxicating effect on the Silika. Silika would often challenge each other to the [[Contest]], a water-drinking game.<ref name="SWJ1" />
